_comment: Visual QC Tool -- All tunable thresholds. Edit here, not in code.

alignment._comment_orb_features: Max ORB keypoints. More = slower but more robust on complex textures.
alignment._comment_match_ratio: Lowe ratio test. Lower = stricter matching.
alignment._comment_min_matches: Fallback to phase-correlation if fewer good matches than this.
alignment._comment_roi: ROI masking to prevent cluttered backgrounds (person, cables, shop equipment) from dominating ORB keypoint detection. Center-crop keeps central x_frac x y_frac of the frame.
alignment._comment_brightness_mask: Optional: restrict keypoints to bright (reflective metal) regions. Set true for bright stainless steel on dark backgrounds. Leave false for dark assemblies (painted steel, black brackets).

difference._comment_ssim_win: SSIM sliding window size (must be odd).
difference._comment_ssim_cutoff: SSIM similarity below this is flagged. Lower = more sensitive.
difference._comment_morph: Morphological kernel size. Larger = more noise removed.
difference._comment_min_area: Min contour area (px^2) to flag. Primary FP control. 4000 ~= 63x63 px.
difference._comment_blur: Gaussian blur kernel size applied before diffing to suppress parallax/misalignment edges. Set to 0 to disable.
